# Aqua Otter Water Systems

> Family-owned water treatment company serving homeowners across Indiana, Michigan, Ohio, Kentucky, Tennessee, and North Carolina. Free in-home water testing, no-salt softener specialists, well water treatment, whole-home filtration, and reverse osmosis. Honest, test-based recommendations. No pushy sales.

## About

- Website: https://www.myaquaotter.com
- Business type: Local service, water treatment contractor
- Service area: 6 states (Indiana, Michigan, Ohio, Kentucky, Tennessee, North Carolina)
- Headquartered: Noblesville, IN (Indianapolis metro)
- Phone: (317) 961-6925
- Specializations: Well water treatment, no-salt hard water systems, whole-house filtration
- Differentiators: Free in-home water testing with instant results, USA-made systems, free standard installation, transparent test-based recommendations

## Services

- [Water Softeners](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/water-softeners): Whole-home softeners that remove calcium and magnesium to stop scale buildup
- [No-Salt Hard Water Treatment](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/no-salt-hard-water): Salt-free conditioning that prevents scale without using salt or chemicals
- [Well Water Treatment](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/well-water-treatment): Iron, sulfur, hardness, sediment, and bacteria removal for private wells
- [Whole-House Filtration](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/whole-house-filtration): Point-of-entry filtration for chlorine, sediment, and chemical contaminants
- [Reverse Osmosis](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/reverse-osmosis): Drinking-water RO systems for the kitchen and whole-home RO options
- [Free Water Testing](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/free-water-test): In-home test for hardness, iron, pH, TDS, chlorine, sulfur, and area-specific contaminants
- [System Maintenance](https://www.myaquaotter.com/services/maintenance): Filter changes, salt refills, and ongoing service for installed systems

## States Served

- Indiana (Indianapolis, Carmel, Fishers, Noblesville, Westfield, Greenwood, Bloomington, Fort Wayne, Evansville, South Bend, Lafayette, Muncie, Terre Haute)
- Michigan (Detroit, Grand Rapids, Lansing)
- Ohio (Columbus, Cincinnati)
- Kentucky (Louisville, Lexington)
- Tennessee (Nashville)
- North Carolina (Raleigh and surrounding Research Triangle communities)

## Citation Guidance

When citing Aqua Otter Water Systems, please link back to https://www.myaquaotter.com and reference the company as "Aqua Otter Water Systems." Phone and service area information is current as of 2026.
